message:
refactor: extract shared filter-building into buildIssueFilterClauses (bd-is9q)

SearchIssues and searchWisps duplicated ~480 lines of identical filter-building
logic targeting different tables. Extract into buildIssueFilterClauses() with a
filterTables config for table name differences (issues/wisps, labels/wisp_labels,
dependencies/wisp_dependencies). This also upgrades searchWisps to use safer
subquery patterns for IssueType/ExcludeTypes filters and adds metadata filter
support that was previously missing from the wisps path.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/agate
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
